query: SELECT config_key, CASE WHEN config_value IS NOT NULL AND config_value != '' THEN CONCAT(LEFT(config_value, 5), '***') ELSE '(未設定)' END AS masked_value FROM site_config WHERE config_key LIKE 'line_%';
